name: Chiron Real Estate Inc.
business: Chiron Real Estate Inc. is an internally managed REIT that primarily acquires healthcare facilities leased to physician groups and regional and national healthcare systems. The company's portfolio consists primarily of medical office buildings, inpatient rehabilitation facilities, surgical hospitals, and other healthcare properties, most of which are leased under triple-net leases. As of December 31, 2025, the company had gross investments of approximately $1.5 billion in real estate properties.

exposures.sentence: We primarily acquire healthcare facilities leased to physician groups and regional and national healthcare systems.

catalysts.sentence: On September 19, 2025, the Company completed a one-for-five reverse stock split of its outstanding shares of common stock, with a corresponding adjustment to the outstanding partnership units of the Operating Partnership.

catalysts.event: Series B Preferred Stock offering completed
catalysts.sentence: On November 20, 2025, the Company sold 2,050,000 shares of its Series B Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, $0.001 par value per share, with a liquidation preference of $25 per share, inclusive of 50,000 shares issued in connection with the underwriters exercise of their over-allotment option.

catalysts.event: Inaugural active adult joint venture investment
catalysts.sentence: On January 6, 2026, the Company entered into a joint venture with a developer to facilitate the development of a 132-unit, active adult residential community in a suburb of Minneapolis, Minnesota.

catalysts.event: White Rock Medical Center Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing by tenant
catalysts.sentence: On January 20, 2026, White Rock Medical Center LLC, filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection under the United States Bankruptcy Code.
